commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: run bot and web server in single asyncio event loop for Linux compatibility

python-telegram-bot v20+ requires signal handlers in the main thread, which
caused a crash when the bot ran in a background thread on Railway (Linux).
Refactored run.py to use asyncio.run() with uvicorn.Server.serve() and the
bot running concurrently via async context manager.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

prevent: add ESLint TDZ rule + CLAUDE.md guards for variable ordering

After the P0 outage caused by a const used before declaration:

1. ESLint: @typescript-eslint/no-use-before-define set to ERROR
   - Catches const/let used before declaration at lint time
   - TypeScript does NOT catch this — it compiles but crashes at runtime
   - Verified: rule fires "was used before it was defined" on test case

2. CLAUDE.md: Added TDZ prevention section to both root and webapp
   - NEVER reference a variable in a hook dep array before its declaration
   - NEVER import from barrel files AND direct files in same module
   - ALWAYS run eslint before committing frontend changes

3. Memory: Documented full incident for future session context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Lazy-load Supabase admin client in all API routes

## Issue
All OAuth and integration API routes were creating Supabase admin
clients at module load time, causing build failures when
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY wasn't available during static generation.

## Solution
- Created getSupabaseAdmin() helper function in each API route
- Clients are now created only when the route handler executes
- Moved from module-level initialization to function-level
- Build now succeeds without runtime env vars

## Files Fixed
- /api/auth/google/callback - OAuth token storage
- /api/auth/slack/callback - OAuth token storage
- /api/integrations/status - Check integration status
- /api/integrations/[integration] - Disconnect integrations

## Required Vercel Environment Variables
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL (client-safe)
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (client-safe)
- SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (server-only, for admin operations)

commit.message:
Log columnar transform + enhanced column encodings

Add LogColumnarTransform (transformType=4) for W3C Extended Log Format files.
CLF format detected but skipped (brackets/quotes are valuable CM context).
IIS W3C benchmark: -3.5% (-2,217 bytes). Add EntropySegmenter for future use.

Column encoding enhancements for CSV/JSON transforms:
- 2nd-order delta encoding (DeltaInteger2) for quadratic sequences
- Gorilla XOR float encoding for slowly-varying doubles
- Timestamp detection (ISO 8601 Z, space-delimited, CLF) with delta encoding
- Bare CR line ending support, unclosed-quote resilience

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix websockets and other stuff (#51)

* feat: Display real-time vote counts on voting cards, enable party leaders to manually advance phases, and refresh movie picking on new recommendations.

* feat: Add swipe gesture support to MovieCard for mobile users

Swipe right to like, left to dislike, and down to skip with visual
overlay indicators and card transform feedback during the gesture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Stabilize WebSocket connection by storing callback props in refs

Callback identity changes were causing connect/disconnect cycles on every
WS message: message → setLastMessage → new context value → new
handleWsMessage → new onMessage prop → new connect → lifecycle re-runs.

Store onMessage/onConnect/onDisconnect in refs so connect only depends on
token. Wrap handleWsMessage in useCallback for additional stability.
Remove unused lastMessage state from usePartySocket (consumers use
context's lastMessage).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Prevent automatic party state transition from 'created' to 'voting' and refine 'picking' state UI logic.

* feat: Implement immediate party phase view switching and phase-specific timeout updates, and update advance button UI.

* perf: Wrap vote totals update in `startTransition` to prioritize urgent UI updates.

Import Lecture 20: Bayesian regression, Poisson GLM, and priors

- islands1: Poisson GLM for Oceanic tool diversity, pymc3→pymc + theano→pytensor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(generator): FTE-proportional garde density + tighter CS equity caps

Garde fix: Use weekday-only eligible days as density denominator.
Previously weekends were counted equally for all MARs, inflating
part-time eligibility (71% instead of 50% FTE for half-time).
Result: half-time MARs now get ~50% of full-time gardes.

CS fix: Tighten soft density cap from 1.3x to 1.15x across all paths
(LRM quota, selectMAR, rebalance). Rebalance pass 1: 1.25->1.15,
pass 2: 1.15->1.05, trigger gap: 30%->20%. This prevents 30%+ CS
count gaps between MARs with similar FTE (e.g., 31 vs 23).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add settleSeasonInvoice for season-end billing

Creates and finalizes a Stripe Invoice (net-14 days) for a league at
registration close:
- Small tier: flat flat_season_fee_cents ($299)
- Standard/Large/Enterprise: gross reg fees × effective rate (total_amount_cents
  sum of paid player_payments); note references floor subscription for auditors
Requires stripe_billing_customer_id on the league (created by assignLeagueTier).
Platform admin only. Logs to audit trail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct Button_Settings ID mapping and color value escaping

Two root-cause bugs prevented colors from displaying on the KUMO web UI
and caused the Label Manager app to read/write colors to wrong buttons:

1. Button_Settings IDs are interleaved in blocks of 16 (Src 1-16 -> 1-16,
   Dst 1-16 -> 17-32, Src 17-32 -> 33-48, etc.), not sequential
   (inputs 1-64, outputs 65-128) as previously assumed.

2. Color values require escaped inner quotes {\"classes\":\"color_N\"}
   for the web UI's eval() to parse them. Unescaped quotes silently fail.

Added Get-ButtonSettingsIndex helper to both PS1 files and updated the
Python KumoParamID.button_color() formula. All 73 tests pass.

fix(inbound): descarta resposta se nova msg chegou durante processamento FastAPI

Insere check de wamid pós-FastAPI (Supabase - Verifica Wamid Pós-FastAPI +
Resposta Ainda Válida?) entre Processa Resposta FastAPI e os nós downstream.

Se uma nova mensagem chegou enquanto o FastAPI processava, o last_wamid na
sdr_debounce terá mudado — a resposta é descartada silenciosamente.
A msg mais recente já foi salva no DB e terá seu próprio ciclo de processamento
com histórico completo (ambas as mensagens incluídas).

commit.message:
Fix infinite redirect loop when session cookie outlives user

When a user is deleted but their JWT cookie remains valid, the
dashboard layout and middleware would loop: layout redirects to /login,
middleware sees valid JWT and bounces back to /dashboard. Now the
layout detects a stale cookie and redirects through /api/auth/logout
(GET) which clears the cookie before sending to /login.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scope group discovery to DEPT- prefix to avoid touching unrelated groups

The endsWith ' Devices' filter was matching any security group ending in
' Devices', causing the script to modify membership of unrelated groups.
Renamed managed groups to 'DEPT-<Department> Devices' and switched to a
startsWith('DEPT-') filter so only script-owned groups are ever touched.

heading instead of getting clipped by the navbar.

  small tier → application_fee_amount = 0 (flat $299 season invoice instead)
  standard/large/enterprise → uses platform_fee_bps (referral discount pre-baked)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix deploy: use custom HookDeployer factory for DEPLOYER privilege

Arachnid's generic CREATE2 factory becomes the hook's DEPLOYER, making
admin calls impossible. HookDeployer retains DEPLOYER privilege so it
can wire trustedRouter and authorizedRSC after deployment.

repository.name: TrancheFi-Hook
repository.description: Uniswap V4 hook that splits LP positions into Senior (fixed yield, priority fees, IL-protected) and Junior (variable yield, absorbs IL first) tranches. Waterfall fee distribution adapts per asset class: 90/10 for stablecoins, 50/50 for volatile pairs, 95/5 for RWAs. Built for UHI8.
